allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\); $cmd = Get-Command ollama -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output "ollama: $\($cmd.Source\)"; & ollama --version } else { Write-Output "ollama NOT on PATH yet \(refresh shell\)" })

Bash(LLM_PROVIDER=ollama OLLAMA_MODEL=llama3.1 node -e "console.log\('start'\); require\('./utils/cases/llmOrganizer'\).organizeWithLLM\('hello world test'\).then\(r => console.log\('result:', r\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('err:', e.message\)\);")

PowerShell($body = @{ model="llama3.1"; prompt="Say hi in 3 words"; stream=$false } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output "OK: $\($r.response\)"; Write-Output "duration_ms: $\([math]::Round\($r.total_duration/1e6\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { Write-Output "details: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($mem = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; Write-Output "TotalRAM_GB: $\([math]::Round\($mem.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB,1\)\)"; Write-Output "FreeRAM_GB: $\([math]::Round\($mem.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\)\)"; $cpu = Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "CPU: $\($cpu.Name\)"; $gpu = Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name,AdapterRAM; foreach \($g in $gpu\) { Write-Output "GPU: $\($g.Name\) \($\([math]::Round\($g.AdapterRAM/1GB,1\)\) GB\)" })

PowerShell($logPath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Ollama\\server.log"; if \(Test-Path $logPath\) { Get-Content $logPath -Tail 60 } else { Write-Output "no log at $logPath"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Ollama" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime })

PowerShell($body = @{ model="llama3.1"; prompt="Say hi in 3 words"; stream=$false; options=@{ num_gpu=0 } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 240; Write-Output "OK: $\($r.response\)"; Write-Output "duration_s: $\([math]::Round\($r.total_duration/1e9,1\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.ErrorDetails\) { Write-Output "details: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\('C','D'\) } | Select-Object Name, @{n='Used_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\)}}, @{n='Free_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}}, Root)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ollama\\models"\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ollama\\models" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Output "current models size: $\([math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\)\) GB at $env:USERPROFILE\\.ollama\\models" } else { Write-Output "no existing models dir" })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk | Where-Object { $_.DriveType -eq 3 } | Select-Object DeviceID, @{n='Used_GB';e={[math]::Round\(\($_.Size - $_.FreeSpace\)/1GB,1\)}}, @{n='Free_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.FreeSpace/1GB,1\)}}, @{n='Size_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Size/1GB,1\)}}, VolumeName)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'ollama' -or $_.MainWindowTitle -match 'ollama' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id; Write-Output "---"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "daemon UP: $\($r.models.Count\) models" } catch { Write-Output "daemon DOWN: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '^ollama' } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $remaining = Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '^ollama' }; if \($remaining\) { Write-Output "STILL RUNNING:"; $remaining | Select-Object ProcessName, Id } else { Write-Output "all ollama processes stopped" }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags -TimeoutSec 2 | Out-Null; Write-Output "daemon STILL UP" } catch { Write-Output "daemon DOWN \(good\)" })

PowerShell($src = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ollama\\models"; $dst = "D:\\ollama\\models"; if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\ollama"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "D:\\ollama" -Force | Out-Null }; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Write-Output "ERR: $dst already exists - aborting"; exit 1 }; Write-Output "moving $src -> $dst"; Move-Item -Path $src -Destination $dst -Force; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $dst -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Output "moved successfully: $\([math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\)\) GB at $dst" } else { Write-Output "ERR: move did not complete" })

PowerShell($ollamaApp = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama app.exe"; if \(Test-Path $ollamaApp\) { Start-Process -FilePath $ollamaApp; Write-Output "started: $ollamaApp" } else { Write-Output "ollama app.exe not found at expected path; trying ollama.exe serve"; Start-Process -FilePath "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama.exe" -ArgumentList "serve" -WindowStyle Hidden })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "daemon UP"; $r.models | Select-Object name, @{n='size_GB';e={[math]::Round\($_.size/1GB,2\)}}; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \(\(Get-Date\) -ge $deadline\) { Write-Output "TIMEOUT - daemon did not come up"; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '^ollama' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id })

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '^ollama' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id; Write-Output "---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 11434 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess)

PowerShell($logPath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Ollama\\server.log"; if \(Test-Path $logPath\) { Write-Output "=== last 30 lines of $logPath ==="; Get-Content $logPath -Tail 30 } else { Write-Output "no log at $logPath" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Ollama" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending)

PowerShell($candidates = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Ollama", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ollama", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama"\); foreach \($p in $candidates\) { Write-Output "=== $p ==="; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{n='Type';e={if \($_.PSIsContainer\){'DIR'}else{'FILE'}}}, Length, LastWriteTime } else { Write-Output "\(not present\)" } })

PowerShell($env:OLLAMA_MODELS = "D:\\ollama\\models"; Write-Output "session OLLAMA_MODELS = $env:OLLAMA_MODELS"; Start-Process -FilePath "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama app.exe"; Write-Output "ollama app started")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "daemon UP"; $r.models | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  - $\($_.name\) \($\([math]::Round\($_.size/1GB,2\)\) GB\)" }; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \(\(Get-Date\) -ge $deadline\) { Write-Output "TIMEOUT - checking log..."; cmd /c "type `"%LOCALAPPDATA%\\Ollama\\app.log`"" | Select-Object -Last 8 })

PowerShell($f = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Ollama\\server.log"; Write-Output "size: $\(\(Get-Item $f\).Length\) bytes, modified: $\(\(Get-Item $f\).LastWriteTime\)"; Write-Output "---"; Get-Content $f -Raw | Select-Object -Last 1)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name 'ollama','ollama app' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table ProcessName, Id, @{n='StartTime';e={$_.StartTime}}, Path; Write-Output "---"; cmd /c "netstat -ano | findstr :11434" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name 'ollama','ollama app' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $env:OLLAMA_MODELS = "D:\\ollama\\models"; $env:OLLAMA_DEBUG = "1"; & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama\\ollama.exe" serve 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)
